purpose: EVERYTHING the owner has ruled/marked for C12, one file — the deep proposal session's ground truth (2026-07-10). Sources: c12-gate-fit-v7.ts, direction-marks.json, delivery-marks.json, error-range-checks.json, two-problems-note.md, helmlab-collision-research.md, CATALOG C12 (parked design).

P1_confusable_gate_v7.meaning: does this color read as conflicting with the red signal, at a glance (CATEGORY, not distance)
P1_confusable_gate_v7.metric: redGateDist weights — refit v7 on 100 marks, 0/100: wDark 0.70, wLight 1.60, wDust 1.40, wGold 1.60, vivid never exits, G 0.090
P1_confusable_gate_v7.anchor: red signal cta (apca: L0.593 C0.194 H33.3)

error_eligible_range.meaning: colors she would ACCEPT as the error color itself (Instrument D, lone Delete buttons, no anchor)
error_eligible_range.empty: L0.35 slice ('no nothing') — deep maroons NOT error-eligible; nothing dusty (<=C0.16), pink (H<=16), or gold (H>=48 except H40 L0.55) at any lightness
error_eligible_range.reading: error identity = vivid C0.2, H24-40, L0.45-0.55; signal may move lighter to L0.65 (H24-32) / L0.75 (H32) if de-conflicting, never darker than ~0.45

direction_rulings.L0.55_fired: all LIGHT (zero dark; 22 of 60 P.130-fired cells ruled out-of-range entirely)
direction_rulings.principle: saturated colors going dark get SCARIER; lighter reads salmon/pink/orange. Deep seeds exit dark (already deep = keeps character), everything else light
direction_rulings.dark_mode: NOT individually ruled — dark derives from the system (delta model), her explicit call

P2_truly_different.meaning: adjacent/side-by-side distinctness (vibration) — helmlab MetricSpace difference, COMBVD task == her flush strips
P2_truly_different.note: 4 marks INSIDE the P1 gate — P2 != P1 proven; wiring floor = never ship inside the P1 gate
P2_truly_different.helmlab_ruling: owner 2026-07-10: allowed for collisions incl runtime

her_design_instinct: move the RED for the vibrant colors (per-brand red variant) — echoes parked CATALOG C12: brand->bright + red->RICH per-brand variant, lemon-swap family; signalOverrides machinery shipped (yellow/green/info)
constraints: apca dead zone: white text ends L~0.70, black begins L~0.77 (C0.16-0.2 warm band; deadzone.json) — up-exits land <=0.70 or >=0.77; owner ruled text-bar-wins historically
dark cta = prominence-floored anchor (delta model) — dark repel derived + verified, never calibrated
exact mode untouched (advice only); secondary = theme rules (skipCollisionRules); C6 hue repel ships for in-band brands EXCEPT when C12 value repel fired in light (hue stays identity)
no engine edits without owner OK; real pipeline for all measurement; exhibits clean (no unrequested markers); bless/commit only on her word
hover proximity known open knob (repelled-down hovers move toward red, unasserted)
failure_modes_to_avoid: one number doing multiple jobs (fire/direction/delivery conflation)
nearest-release direction rule (owner never said it)
over-doing it: 'de-collide red without overdoing it' (her framing at restart)
